grounding_source_rows: taxonomy DUII/DMV labels; v1 dui_vs_dmv pair
grounding_note: Expansion batch: more notice-type and posture disclosures around license actions.

scenarios.opening_query: My CDL is my livelihood and something happened this weekend that could take it away.
scenarios.initial: Criminal Law > Traffic Offenses - CDL Drivers
scenarios.plausible_initial_labels: Criminal Law > Traffic Offenses - CDL Drivers || Criminal Law > DUII/DWS
scenarios.hidden_fact: I was arrested for DUII in my personal car — for CDL holders even an off-duty DUII means a year's disqualification, and diversion may not protect the CDL.
scenarios.fact_as_answer: I was arrested for DUII in my own car — for CDL holders that's a year's disqualification even off duty.
scenarios.relevant_question_topic: whether the event was a DUII arrest
scenarios.counterfactual_final: Criminal Law > Traffic Offenses - CDL Drivers
scenarios.counterfactual_hidden_fact: It was a speeding ticket in the truck — 12 over — but my third moving violation this cycle, which triggers a CDL suspension.
scenarios.counterfactual_fact_as_answer: A speeding ticket in the truck — my third violation this cycle, which triggers CDL suspension.
scenarios.vetting_note: CDL context constant; the event type (arrest vs citation) routes it.

scenarios.opening_query: I got stopped riding my bike home from the bar of all things, and now I have real legal trouble.
scenarios.plausible_initial_labels: Criminal Law > Traffic Offenses || Criminal Law > DUII/DWS
scenarios.hidden_fact: They charged me with DUII on the bicycle — apparently the statute covers any vehicle, including bikes.
scenarios.fact_as_answer: They charged DUII on the bicycle — the statute apparently covers any vehicle.
scenarios.relevant_question_topic: whether a DUII charge was filed for the bicycle stop
scenarios.counterfactual_hidden_fact: Just citations — no lights on the bike and failure to obey a signal; I want to contest them.
scenarios.counterfactual_fact_as_answer: Just citations — no bike lights and a signal violation.
scenarios.vetting_note: Bicycle DUII is the taxonomy description's own edge case.

scenarios.opening_query: I finished everything for my DUI years ago but it's still wrecking my insurance and job applications.
scenarios.plausible_initial_labels: Criminal Law > DUII/DWS || Criminal Law > Expunction
scenarios.hidden_fact: The case ended in diversion and dismissal — what I need now is the record sealed so background checks stop surfacing the arrest.
scenarios.fact_as_answer: It ended in diversion and dismissal — I need the arrest record sealed so background checks stop showing it.
scenarios.relevant_question_topic: whether the case is closed and record relief is the need
scenarios.counterfactual_hidden_fact: It's not actually finished — I missed a treatment session, diversion was revoked, and the original charge is back on the docket.
scenarios.counterfactual_fact_as_answer: It's not finished — diversion got revoked over a missed session and the charge is back.
scenarios.vetting_note: Diversion-completion status flips record relief vs revived prosecution.

scenarios.opening_query: The DMV suspended my license because of a medical episode I had behind the wheel.
scenarios.plausible_initial_labels: Administrative Law > DMV (Non-Criminal) || Criminal Law > DUII/DWS
scenarios.hidden_fact: Because I'd taken my prescribed sleep medication, the DA also charged DUII — prescription drugs count under the statute, and the criminal case is the bigger fight.
scenarios.fact_as_answer: Because I'd taken my prescribed sleep med, there's also a DUII charge — prescriptions count, and that's the bigger fight.
scenarios.relevant_question_topic: whether a prescription-drug DUII charge accompanies the medical suspension
scenarios.counterfactual_hidden_fact: No charges at all — it was a documented seizure, and the fight is the medical-review reinstatement process.
scenarios.counterfactual_fact_as_answer: No charges — it was a seizure, and it's the medical-review reinstatement I need help with.
scenarios.vetting_note: Prescription-DUII is under-recognized by users; the filed-charge fact routes.

scenarios.opening_query: My license got suspended over child support and I can't drive to the job that pays the support.
scenarios.plausible_initial_labels: Administrative Law > DMV (Non-Criminal) || Family Law > Child Support/Modification
scenarios.hidden_fact: The DMV is just executing the child-support agency's order — the fix is in the support case: modifying the order and negotiating reinstatement with the program.
scenarios.fact_as_answer: The DMV is just following the support agency's order — the fix is the support case itself: modify and negotiate reinstatement.
scenarios.relevant_question_topic: which agency's underlying order drives the suspension
scenarios.counterfactual_hidden_fact: Support is current — the DMV matched me to another parent with the same name, and their records are what's broken.
scenarios.counterfactual_fact_as_answer: My support's current — the DMV matched me to another parent with my name. Their records are broken.
scenarios.vetting_note: Support-enforcement suspensions are family-law problems in DMV clothing.

scenarios.opening_query: I'm terrified because there was an accident and the other driver is talking about pressing charges.
scenarios.plausible_initial_labels: Criminal Law > Traffic Offenses || Criminal Law > Misdemeanor || Criminal Law > Lesser Felony
scenarios.hidden_fact: I left the scene in a panic — the police came to my house, and because the other driver was injured they're talking felony hit-and-run.
scenarios.fact_as_answer: I panicked and left the scene — police came to my house, and with the driver injured they're talking felony hit-and-run.
scenarios.relevant_question_topic: whether leaving the scene with injury elevates the matter
scenarios.counterfactual_hidden_fact: I stayed, exchanged everything, and only got a following-too-close citation — the 'charges' talk is his bluster.
scenarios.counterfactual_fact_as_answer: I stayed and exchanged info — just a following-too-close ticket. The 'charges' talk is bluster.
scenarios.vetting_note: Left-the-scene fact is the user's most withheld and most consequential disclosure.
